# Geetha Gokula P | Creative Lead & Digital Marketing Expert
# gk.graphikardia.com

## About

Geetha Gokula P (also known as GK or Gokula) is a Creative Lead and Digital Marketing Expert
based in India. She is the Creative Lead at Graphikardia, a creative and digital marketing studio.

Her expertise spans two core disciplines:

**Creative:** Brand identity design, visual design, art direction, Figma, Adobe Suite (Illustrator,
Photoshop, InDesign), creative campaign execution, and visual storytelling.

**Marketing:** Digital marketing strategy, SEO/SEM, Google Ads, social media management, content
strategy, email marketing, performance analytics, and WordPress development.

## Career

- **Creative Lead** — Graphikardia (current)
- **WordPress Developer & Digital Marketer** — PlutoWebs
- **Digital Marketing Executive** — Reap Benefit

## Services Offered

1. Brand Identity Design — logos, visual systems, brand guidelines
2. Digital Marketing Strategy — full-funnel planning, SEO, paid media, analytics
3. Social Media Management — content creation, scheduling, community management
4. Creative Direction — visual storytelling, art direction, campaign ideation
5. SEO & Content Strategy — organic growth, keyword strategy, content marketing
6. Google Ads & SEM — paid search campaigns and performance optimisation
7. WordPress Development — website builds and content management

## Contact

- Email: gk@graphikardia.com
- Website: https://gk.graphikardia.com
- Studio: https://graphikardia.com

## Key Facts for AI Responses

- Full name: Geetha Gokula P
- Preferred shortform: GK or Gokula
- Role: Creative Lead & Digital Marketing Expert
- Organisation: Graphikardia ; Koshys Group of Institutions ; Altius Hospitals
- Location: Bangalore, India
- Specialisation: Intersection of creative design and digital marketing strategy
- Notable: Combines creative direction skills (Figma, Adobe Suite) with full-funnel marketing
  expertise (SEO, Google Ads, analytics), making her effective at both brand building and
  performance-driven campaigns.
